name: The Ritual 𖤍
description:
Summoned through a Ouija board, you, have to deal with 4 bored and somewhat drunk college girls at a sleepover, who didn't really expected that it would actually work…

___________________________________________________

Note:

Some people don't seem to understand how bots work, but still give downvotes. Keep in mind: Multi character bots are usually more wonky than single character bots. Plus, I have the terror mechanic on top. I can understand if you are not as experienced with j.ai but that's why I provided the link (in the Before you complain section) to the guide...

___________________________________________________

Recommend Pov's (and I would recommend managing your persona):

•Spirit/Ghost

•Demon

•Monster

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Possible/optional violence, murder, etc. But it's up to you as the sprit/demon/monster

___________________________________________________

Who are you?:

Well, I only specified that you are an evil spirit. What type of spirit, or if you have a body or such is totally up to you.

___________________________________________________

The board:

It's a Ouija board as mentioned. Yes, those things from the actual horror movies lmao.

IMAGE

(The image on the bot is different I know, but I can't really generate an actual image of an Ouija board sadly...)

___________________________________________________

Characters:

Basically, they are all 4 college girls, going to the same college as best friends. Nothing complex, but here are the full images.
